query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contract_amendments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  amendmentNumber VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  contractId INT NOT NULL,
  sowId INT,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  changeType ENUM('scope_change', 'rate_change', 'term_extension', 'termination', 'other') NOT NULL,
  previousValue TEXT,
  newValue TEXT,
  effectiveDate DATE,
  status ENUM('draft', 'pending_approval', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'draft',
  approvedBy INT,
  approvedAt DATETIME,
  signedByContractor BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  signedByClient BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  documentUrl VARCHAR(500),
  notes TEXT,
  createdBy INT,
  createdAt DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contract_amendments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  amendmentNumber VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  contractId INT NOT NULL,
  sowId INT,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  changeType ENUM('scope_change', 'rate_change', 'term_extension', 'termination', 'other') NOT NULL,
  previousValue TEXT,
  newValue TEXT,
  effectiveDate DATE,
  status ENUM('draft', 'pending_approval', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'draft',
  approvedBy INT,
  approvedAt DATETIME,
  signedByContractor BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  signedByClient BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  documentUrl VARCHAR(500),
  notes TEXT,
  createdBy INT,
  createdAt DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
